title: eutrema racemosum
intro: Eutrema racemosum, also known as Braya racemosa, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family, Brassicaceae. The plant is rich in glucosinolates, which have been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eutrema racemosum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine for its expectorant and anti-cough properties.
